products.name: Animal Runtz
products.description:
Animal Runtz is a slightly indica dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa) created through crossing the tasty Animal Cookies X Runtz strains.

This balanced hybrid is said to be a patient favorite for its mouthwatering flavor and super sociable high that's often preferred for those with social anxiety.

The taste of Animal Runtz will linger long after you finish toking, with flavors of sweet fruity berries, nutty cherries and sugary citrus dancing across your tongue.

The aroma is just as bright and vibrant, with a sour, citrusy overtone accented by fresh berries and nutty cookies.

products.name: Bazooka Punch
products.description:
Bazooka Punch is not just a name; it's a promise of a robust and balanced cannabis experience.

This strain packs a punch, inducing a delightful combination of euphoria and relaxation.

The terpene profile, featuring Fruit Punch, Fuel, Limonene, Caryophyllene, and Humulene, adds layers of flavor to the journey.

products.name: Berry Blast
products.description:
Berry Blast is an indica dominant hybrid strain (70% indica/30% sativa) created through crossing the classic Blue Dream Super Silver Haze Cut X Johnny Blaze strains.

If you're after a fast-hitting high with a delicious flavor to it, too, Berry Blast is the bud for you.

This bud has a sweet and fruity sugary blueberry candy flavor with a lightly spicy exhale. The aroma is of fresh fruity berries, sugary candies and a hint of spicy earthiness.

products.name: Blackberry
products.description:
Blackberry is a hybrid strain with a perfect blend of indica and sativa. The strain is mouthwatering to say the least. Not only are the buds beautiful, but they are scrumptious at the same time.

The aroma is intoxicating, as it is quite fruity with a hint of earth. There is a pretty good reason why the strain is referred to as Blackberry.

It tastes amazing and smooth just like a bowl of fruit. If you are looking for a daytime strain, you should not look any further.

products.name: Cheetah Mintz
products.description:
Cheetah Mintz is an indica dominant hybrid strain (70% indica/30% sativa) created through crossing the delicious (Cheetah Piss X Cold Heat) X (Zonuts X Ice Cream Cake) strains.

This powerful combination creates a potent child strain with amazing 1:1 THC:CBD levels and long-lasting effects to go right along with it.

This bud has a sweet and creamy mint candy flavor with an earthy and herbal cheese aroma to go along with it.

products.name: Critical Cheese
products.description:
Critical Cheese is a sativa dominant hybrid strain created through a cross of the deliciously potent Cheese X Critical Plus strains.

This bud is best known for its intense flavor of minty buttery cheese with citrus tinges that can be disgusting to some users.

The aroma is very much the same, with a citrus and minty cheesy aroma that is incredibly strong and can fill a room with its stench within seconds.

products.name: Frosted Flakes
products.description:
Frosted Flakes is an indica dominant strain with a 70:30 indica/ sativa ratio. It is a cross between pre-98 and White Bubba.

The buds look as though they have been dipped in coke and smells like cereal, which explains how it got its name in the first place.

The high is quite exquisite and will not leave locked to your couch.

products.name: Gorilla Glue 4 X Zkittles
products.description:
Gorilla Glue 4 X Zkittlez is a slightly indica dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa).

If you love a great hybrid with a slight indica lean and a great flavor, Gorilla Glue 4 X Zkittlez is totally made for you.

This bud packs the best of everything, with a stimulating yet soothing high and a mouthwatering taste that will leave you begging for more. 

The aroma is very similar, with a spicy overtone that's accented by creamy dark chocolate and earthy flowers.

products.name: Jack Widow Flower
products.description:
This Sativa dominant strain has an Indica/Sativa content of 20/80 percent.

It is produced by mating White Widow with Jack Herer.

It has a strong aroma that is a mixture of skunk-y and citrus scents. It has a fresh aroma that is a blend of lemon, spicy and sweet flavors.

products.name: Mac Stomper
products.description:
MAC Stomper is an indica dominant hybrid strain (70% indica/30% sativa) created through crossing the potent MAC X Grape Stomper strains.

If you're looking for something amazing in the flavor department to help you get to sleep at night, look no further than this gorgeous gal.

MAC Stomper packs a unique, mouthwatering taste that's filled with a bouquet of fresh fruity berries, spicy grapes and a touch of sour, lemony citrus that tingles on the tongue.

On the aromatic side, the scent of MAC Stomper is much spicier and more floral, filled with rich grape wine and a touch of earthiness.

products.name: Pablo's Revenge
products.description:
Pablo's Revenge is a slightly indica dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa) created through crossing the delicious Animal Mints X Sherbet Cake strains.

If you've been seeking out the perfect bud to help end out your day in style, look no further than Pablo's Revenge.

This bud packs a punch of full-bodied effects that will settle both mind and body before gently carrying you off to dreamland.

This bud has a sweet and fruity berry citrus flavor with a punch of sharp mint upon exhale. The aroma takes it up a level, adding in layers of spicy diesel and peppery herbs.

products.name: Peanut Butter Breath
products.description:
Peanut Butter Breath is a rare evenly balanced hybrid strain (50% indica/50% sativa) created through crossing the classic Dosidos X Mendobreath F2 strains.

With this bud, the name says it all – the flavor is nutty and earthy with a rich herbal overtone. The aroma follows the same profile, with an earthy herbal overtone that's accented by rich nuttiness.

products.name: Sour Diesel X OG Kush
products.description:
Sour Diesel X OG Kush, is a popular and intensely potent combination of Sour Diesel and OG Kush, two of the most legendary strains in the world.

This strain delivers a strong, delightful mix of head and body effects, including a deep physical buzz, relaxation, euphoria, mental relief, and cerebral introspection.

This strain has a sweet, tangy flavor and a fruity aroma.

products.name: Super Boof
products.description:
Super Boof is an evenly balanced hybrid strain (50% indica/50% sativa) created through crossing the potent Black Cherry Punch X Tropicana Cookies strains.

If you're in the market for a new super balanced hybrid to add to your lineup, look no further than Super Boof.

This bud has a sweet and fruity cherry berry flavor with a super nutty and sour citrusy aroma to match.

products.name: Blue Dream Infused 1.5 Gram Pre-Roll
products.description: Rolled up and ready to smoke, Pre-Rolls are a convenient and effective way to consume cannabis. Pre-Rolls come in many different forms and can be rolled with flower, shake, "b-buds", infused with concentrates, and more.

products.name: Belgium Chocolate Bar
products.description: Cannabis chocolates are popular because the dominant chocolate flavor overpowers the "green" taste you may find in other edibles. Because edibles are digested and absorbed by your stomach and liver, the activation is often longer than other consumption methods, taking on average 45 minutes, and sometimes up to 2 hours. It is important to start low and slow when consuming edibles so you don't over do it. Take extra caution to ensure edibles are out of the reach of children.
